category_sources: source_facts.description says app for managing virtual machines; official GitHub README describes a graphical tool for managing virtual machines via libvirt.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses Virtual Machine Manager; source_facts.name is virt-manager.
docs_sources: Official virt-manager website is the project site; official README provides usage and tool details.
repo_sources: Official virt-manager source page says the mainline development repository is https://github.com/virt-manager/virt-manager.git.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists virt-manager, virt-install, virt-clone, and virt-xml; official GitHub README mentions libvirt and QEMU/KVM virtual machines.
